sources.name: curby
sources.honest_c3: Bell-inequality violation is independently witnessed by NIST/CU Boulder physics protocol (loophole-free Bell test). Treat as vendor-asserted quantum until end-to-end Bell witness is run locally. Live endpoint uses Twine-blockchain spec (IPLD CIDs); fixture-mock is current default — live wire is deferred to next cycle.

sources.name: anu
sources.honest_c3: Vacuum-fluctuation quantum source per ANU vendor claim; we do not run our own NIST SP 800-90B health tests.

sources.name: nist_beacon
sources.honest_c3: is_quantum=0 — vendor self-classifies as MIXED entropy (HSM + multiple RNGs); used as US sovereign mirror to ANU (AU) for geographic-diversity proofs. Live endpoint returns nested JSON wrapped in 'pulse' key with multi-line whitespace; flat-key parser succeeds on key extraction but signature verification (ECDSA P-384) is NOT performed in this hexa-only build.

sources.name: hardware_qrng
sources.honest_c3: Mock-default + opt-in live serial/PCIe probe. is_quantum=1 is asserted by vendor claim NOT by independent measurement.

downstream_consumers.note: anima wraps the same anu source and additionally provides a 7-source RNG abstraction (urandom, esp32, anu, ibm_q, idq_quantis, kaist_optical, curby + nist_beacon as of 2026-05-03). Future cycle: anima/modules/rng/* shells should call nexus/modules/qrng/* via cross-repo dependency wire (BG ad25ffc42bdccfe64 aware).
Candidate consumer for cross-vendor entropy mixing (curby + anu) in dual_stream entropy beacon.

live_attempt_2026_05_03.curby: FAIL — endpoint returns 404 on /api/randomness/latest; CURBy uses Twine/IPLD spec at /api/chains; live wire deferred
live_attempt_2026_05_03.nist_beacon: FAIL — endpoint returns valid JSON with nested 'pulse' wrapper + multi-line pretty-print; flat-key parser does extract pulseIndex/outputValue/signatureValue but full ECDSA P-384 verification NOT done in hexa
live_attempt_2026_05_03.anu: untested live in this cycle (rate-limited, mock-default selftest)

falsifiers_frozen.F_CURBY_01: mock fixture deterministic — same fixture JSON → same pulse_id + hex (selftest enforced)
falsifiers_frozen.F_CURBY_02: live pulse 64 bytes valid hex (skipped if no network)
falsifiers_frozen.F_CURBY_03: twine_anchor non-empty on ok=1 pulse (selftest enforced)
falsifiers_frozen.F_NIST_01: mock fixture deterministic — same fixture JSON → same pulse_index + output (selftest enforced)
falsifiers_frozen.F_NIST_02: live pulse 64 bytes valid hex (skipped if no network)
falsifiers_frozen.F_NIST_03: signature non-empty on ok=1 pulse (selftest enforced)
